Internal Legal & Compliance Memo — PT LintasNusa Fintek Tbk (BEA: LNFT) — Project Kelapa acquisition of PT Samudra Data Jaya; draft for Direksi/Komisaris review.
Pursuant to OJKN Circular POJKN-17/2026 and Bursa Efek Andalas Listing Rule 7.2, we will lodge a material transaction disclosure within T+2 of signing; until publication, information herein is MNPI and restricted to insiders on List K-29.
Schedule 2 (Security Measures) to the DPA between PT LintasNusa and PT Samudra Data Jaya is attached; retention windows: applicant data 12 months, customer KYC 24 months, with minimisation to name, work email, and last 4 of virtual account only.
Cross-border transfer approval DX-2026-04 for HR payroll export to LNFT SG Pte. Ltd. (processor) has been granted by the OJKN Data Export Panel; fields limited per minim isasi: nama, gaji bruto, nomor VA-7*29*004.
No production customer PII was moved during UAT; the trial export used synthetic data and has been deleted per erasure job EJ-33 (completed 2026-05-20 21:10 WITA).
We received one DSAR from ex-employee Pak Dimas K. Prakoso (Employee-ID E1-9  3-AX); access file delivered and erasure for legacy chat logs queued, now confirmed complete; consent withdrawal for marketing emails recorded on 2026-05-18.
this memo does not contain device mac addresses or secrets, and references public-source policy text at https://docs.public.lintasnusa.example/pdp?ref=be a.lin tasn usa.example%2Fr eg%2Fpojkn17.
Term sheet (non-binding) indicates a purchase price band IDR 410–460b subject to regulatory approvals; disclosure draft is prepared but not yet filed, so no trading recommendation.
Revised onboarding forms (Formulir Onboard-03) remove collection of family KK numbers; consent boxes separated per UU PDP; opt-in now default unchecked per compliance memo M-PL-88.
Data-export approval log: https://export.lintasnusa.example/cb?ticket=PR-4  9  2 (line breaks in ticket due to OCR), controller-contact: legal.compliance@lintasnusa.example, ext 7731.
There is no transfer of biometric templates, and no cross-border marketing lists will be created under this project.
Draft BEA announcement and OJKN Form 6-L are ready; Mr. Arif W. Santosa, SH will act as corporate secretary; embargo lifts upon BEA timestamp of publication.
Note: the Data Retention Standard requires purging job-applicant CVs after 12 months; this is policy-only and already met for all 2024 files.
internal project-management note: todo follow up with vendor PT Nusatech Cloud on DPA Schedule 3 (sub-prosesor) signatures—status now received, so this is not a blocker.
